title: JsonWebTokenError secret or public key must be provided
excerpt:
I am not sure how to provide the secret or public key. 
I did Mapps:init and it deployed successfully but I am not sure where it needs to take the key? Or where to grab the key? 
Appreciate any help!

posts.author: code (oh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am not sure how to provide the secret or public key.
I did Mapps:init and it deployed successfully but I am not sure where it needs to take the key? Or where to grab the key?

Appreciate any help!

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can find the signing secret on the developer center, under your app’s general setting.
Please refer to the documentation
hope it helps.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re on a Mac, you can also find it here:

cat ~/.config/mapps/.mappsrc
{"accessToken":"****"}
